events.title: New Year's Day Parade
events.description: Annual celebration featuring marching bands, floats, and community groups.

events.title: Winter Farmers Market
events.description: Fresh produce, baked goods, and local crafts. Every Saturday through March.

events.title: St. Patrick's Day Celebration
events.description: Live Irish music, food vendors, and family activities.

events.title: Earth Day Cleanup
events.description: Community environmental cleanup. Volunteers of all ages welcome.

events.title: Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: Honor ceremony for fallen service members.

events.title: Summer Concert Series - Jazz Night
events.description: Free outdoor concert. Bring chairs and blankets. Concessions available.

events.title: Independence Day Fireworks
events.description: Spectacular fireworks display. Festivities begin at 6:00 PM.

events.title: Labor Day Festival
events.description: Food, games, music, and community booths. Last hurrah of summer.

events.title: Trunk or Treat
events.description: Safe trick-or-treating with decorated car trunks and local organizations.

events.title: Thanksgiving Day Parade
events.description: Classic holiday parade with marching bands and holiday floats.

events.title: Holiday Tree Lighting Ceremony
events.description: Light display, caroling, and holiday cheer to kick off the season.

events.title: Christmas Day Community Dinner
events.description: Free dinner and fellowship for all community members.
